metadata.purpose: Structured playbook dataset, recommendation scoring model, and evaluation dataset for report-defense-ready SOAR demo.
metadata.note: Use as seed/demo data. Validate IDs against existing database before replacing current PB-001..PB-010 records.

evaluationCases.rationale: Hard case for SQLi With Possible Data Access: high-risk context should outrank generic playbooks despite sharing the same alert type.
evaluationCases.baselineTrap: Baseline alertType matching is likely to select a generic playbook instead of the risk-specific one.
